project_type: Python FastAPI web app with server-rendered UI (Jinja2 + HTMX + DaisyUI)
test_framework: pytest with pytest-asyncio, mock-based unit tests in tests/, fixtures in tests/conftest.py
verification_instructions: 1. pip install -e '.[dev]' 2. DB_URL=sqlite+aiosqlite:///./test_auth.db pytest tests/ -x --ignore=tests/integration 3. ruff check src/
environment_constraints: Network available for pip installs. No Docker daemon needed. Use SQLite for testing.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns: repository layer for DB access, service layer for business logic, routes for HTTP. Migrations use CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (not now()). Alembic with render_as_batch for SQLite compat.
key_patterns: 1. FastAPI Depends() injection: routes -> services -> repositories -> AsyncSession. 2. SQLAlchemy declarative models in database/models.py. 3. Alembic migrations in migrations/versions/ with manual revision IDs. 4. UI routes return Jinja2 HTML via templates.TemplateResponse. 5. Settings use pydantic-settings. 6. Passwords can use existing cryptography dependency (bcrypt-like or passlib). 7. DaisyUI night theme with sidebar navigation in base.html.
directory_structure: src/maestro/ contains: main.py (app entrypoint), api/routes/ (HTTP endpoints), config/ (settings, crypto, logger), database/ (models, session), repositories/ (DB access), services/ (business logic), schemas/ (pydantic DTOs), ui/templates/ (Jinja2). migrations/versions/ has Alembic migrations. tests/ has pytest unit tests.
